test.note: 6 tests failed due to Maildev not running (ECONNREFUSED on port 1025). These are pre-existing environment-dependent failures, not caused by layout-login changes.

typecheck.note: 3 lint errors in unrelated files (noArrayIndexKey in index.tsx and login.tsx). These are pre-existing patterns, not caused by layout-login changes.

lint.note: Same 3 pre-existing noArrayIndexKey errors. Fixed unused imports and accessibility issues in agendar.tsx, login.tsx, reportes/-AdminReportesPage.tsx. Remaining errors are pre-existing.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the 'side-stripe border' ban vs feature requirements. The ban on 'border-left/border-right > 1px as accent stripe' conflicts with VAL-LAYOUT-003 which requires active section highlighting (borde izquierdo). Consider allowing ≤3px border-left for active nav states while maintaining the ban for decorative purposes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-layout-redesign review: 'border-l-[3px] border-l-[var(--brand-600)]' used for active SidebarItem. AGENTS.md bans side-stripes but feature requirement explicitly requires 'borde izquierdo' for highlighting.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve typography guidance conflict between AGENTS.md ('Sora for headings') and .impeccable.md ('Geist for both headings and body'). Current implementation uses Public Sans which aligns with .impeccable.md, not AGENTS.md.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-layout-redesign review: sidebar labels use font-['Public_Sans'], not Sora. .impeccable.md says Geist for both, AGENTS.md says Sora headings.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add known pre-existing TypeScript/lint errors entry for: index.tsx (noArrayIndexKey line 339), login.tsx (noArrayIndexKey line 73). These patterns are intentionally used (static rating stars, PIN input array) and not caused by any feature changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-layout-redesign review notes these errors pre-exist. Verified via git diff - none of the layout-login features modified these files.
